title: Chocolate Mousse Cheesecake
excerpt: Ingredients 250 g cream cheese 250 g mascarpone 160 ml castor sugar 60 ml cocoa 250 ml cream 5 ml vanilla 1 Lindt chocolate 30 ml milk 1 packet oreo biscuits 60 ml butter melted Method chop the oreo biscuits fine in a food processor melt the butter in the microwave and mix with the …
html:
Ingredients

  • 250 g cream cheese
  • 250 g mascarpone
  • 160 ml castor sugar
  • 60 ml cocoa
  • 250 ml cream
  • 5 ml vanilla
  • 1 Lindt chocolate
  • 30 ml milk
  • 1 packet oreo biscuits
  • 60 ml butter melted

Method

  1. chop the oreo biscuits fine in a food processor
  2. melt the butter in the microwave and mix with the biscuits
  3. butter a springform pan and press the biscuit mixture firmly into the pan. Put it in the fridge to set.
  4. in a bowl whisk the cream with 100 ml castor sugar and the vanilla until soft peaks form
  5. in another bowl beat the cream cheese, mascarpone, sifted cocoa and remaining 60 ml castor sugar until soft and well combined.
  6. melt the Lindt chocolate with 30 ml milk in the microwave. Stir it into the cheese mixture.
  7. now fold the cream into the cheese mixture
  8. spread it out over the oreo biscuits and leave for at least 4 hours in your fridge
  9. remove it from your springform pan and decorate with a flake, berries or whatever you have in your house.
